reason: All three requested candidates are stack/register-save stores from PUSH-style prologue/control-flow code, not packet/session context writes. P622-KS-008 is VM-reachable through the 0x11B56C63 thunk but its flagged stores still target RSP stack slots and do not derive from seed/key arithmetic.
next_action: Reject P622-KS-002/P622-KS-007/P622-KS-008 as keyslot writes; refine scanner to exclude RSP stack stores and trace native callers of 0x11B56C63/FUN_11b50330 for receive context setup.
